evidence_catalog.command: Chromium desktop, 390x844 mobile, keyboard and accessibility-tree inspection

dimension_reasons.offline_and_degraded: The seam must define degraded behavior, but executable offline behavior belongs to a deeper implementation depth.
dimension_reasons.accessibility_and_responsive: A contract seam has no rendered user interface; consuming interfaces retain their own accessibility obligations.
dimension_reasons.performance_and_capacity: The seam carries provisional limits; measured capacity evidence is required when an implementation is selected.
